title: AIDOS Manifest
description: Configuration for AIDOS artifact publishing and write strategy

write.description: Write strategy for the GitHub MCP connector

strategy.description: How changes integrate: 'pr' opens a pull request, 'push' merges directly

target.description: Branch to create from and merge/PR into (default: repo default branch)

reviewers.description: GitHub usernames or @team-names to request PR review from
